name: Facepalm Quest
author: Poki
description: Facepalm Quest is a funny game where you aim to induce facepalms from the audience! Think about what situation you will make the facepalm out of embarrassment, dismay, or anger, and that is the situation you need to recreate! Click around to see how the characters react, think out of the box, and solve the hilarious puzzle! Get ready to raise your hand and cover your face in laughter! How to play Facepalm Quest? Click around to find the solution! Who created Facepalm Quest? Facepalm Quest is created by Stupidella. Play their other game on Poki: Troll Toilet Quest 1 , Stupidella 1 Stupidella 2 , and Stupidella 3 ! How can I play Facepalm Quest for free? You can play Facepalm Quest for free on Poki. Can I play Facepalm Quest on mobile devices and desktop? Facepalm Quest can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
